tracks.meaning: a written or spoken account of facts, findings, or events presented formally or informally
an official document submitted to a company or organization detailing performance, findings, or recommendations
an official account or record of proceedings, testimony, or findings presented to a court or legal authority
to give an account or description of something that happened or was observed
a loud explosive sound caused by gunfire or an explosion
repute or reputation, typically used in the phrase 'by all reports'
a formatted output or summary of data generated by a software application or system
a clinical or diagnostic account documenting a patient's medical findings or test results
a news story or account of current events delivered by a journalist or news organization
